1786950.name: Klaus Veen's Treason
1786950.description:
At the start of each round, players must uncover the Don's killer by finding Clues. Delivering enough Clues to the Clue Processing Unit reveals a Traitor. Traitors conspire against the Innocents, Detective, and Doctor. Traitors win by eliminating all Innocents, while Innocents win by identifying and eliminating the Traitors.


Classes:

Slim Class: Quick but weak.
  • Adrenaline - Boosts movement speed temporarily
  • HP: 80
  • Movement Speed: +10%
  • Damage Bonus: Medium and Shotgun ammo deal 15% more damage
Medium Class: Balanced.
  • Heal - Restores 25 HP
  • HP: 100
  • Damage Bonus: Medium and Sniper ammo deal 7% more damage
Heavy Class: Slow but strong.
  • Shield - Reduces incoming damage by 30% temporarily
  • HP: 110
  • Damage Bonus: Light ammo deals 10% more damage

Role Abilities & Gadgets:

Innocent: Find Clues to snuff out Traitors.
  • Class Ability - Varies by class
  • Clue Locator - Shows positions of all active clues
  • Doctor Locator - Shows position of the Doctor
  • Detective Locator - Shows position of the Detective
Traitor: Eliminate all Innocents.
  • Class Ability - Varies by class
  • Radar - Reveals player locations
  • Revival - Resurrects a dead player
  • Bomb - Plants explosive traps
  • Silenced Pistol - Fires silent shots
  • Spiked Bat - Delivers lethal melee strikes
  • Disguise - Conceals your identity
  • Bear Trap - Immobilizes players
  • Poison Dart - Slows targeted players
Detective: Scan bodies to confirm deaths publicly.
  • Heal - Restores 25 HP
  • Shield - Reduces incoming damage
  • Detective Radar - Reveals player locations
  • Doctor Resuscitation - Revives an unconscious Doctor
  • Scanner - Identifies the killer of a body, or the planter of a bomb
  • Stunning Taser - Stuns and disarms a player
Doctor: Resuscitate unconscious players.
  • Range Heal - Heals you and nearby players
  • Range Adrenaline - Boosts your and nearby players' movement speed temporarily
  • Resuscitation - Resuscitate an unconscious player
  • Body Radar - Locates unconscious players
  • Health Station - Allows players to restore HP
Zombie Traitor: Help Traitors.
  • Adrenaline - Boosts movement speed temporarily
  • Radar - Reveals player locations
  • Bomb - Plants explosive traps
Zombie Don: Help Innocents.
  • Heal - Restores 25 HP
  • Shield - Reduces incoming damage
  • Adrenaline - Boosts movement speed temporarily

Clue Processing Unit (C.P.U.):

At the start of each round, the Don's body appears. When a player discovers it, Clues spawn across the map for players to collect. Delivering enough Clues to the C.P.U. reveals a Traitor. Beware: Traitors can sabotage the C.P.U. by shutting off its power supply!




Join our Discord community!


Treason is a hobby project with a small but active and friendly community. Use the Discord server to look for players, if the game servers are empty.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
